posts.title: Searching for Rust + Tauri Developers
posts.author: ItzzMateo
posts.excerpt: We're looking for a Rust + Tauri developer to help build VOMLabs projects. Here's what we're looking for and why you should join us.
posts.content:
## What We're Building

VOMLabs creates Minecraft software, modern websites, and developer tools built with **Rust**, **Next.js**, and **Tauri**, designed to be fast, lightweight, and beautiful. We're creating alternatives to heavy Electron/Java-based apps that eat up your RAM and take forever to start.

## What We're Looking For

We're searching for someone experienced with:

- **Rust** — The core language powering our native applications
- **Tauri** — Our framework for building tiny, secure native apps
- **Passion for open source** — This is a community project

## Why Join Us?

- **Make a real impact** — Your code will be used by Minecraft players and developers
- **Learn and grow** — Work with modern Rust patterns and native UI development
- **Open source** — All contributions are public and credited
- **Flexible** — Work at your own pace, no pressure

## What You'll Do

- Help implement core features
- Design and build UI components
- Optimize performance and fix bugs
- Collaborate with our small team on features

## How to Apply

Interested? Reach out to us on Discord or open a PR on our **[GitHub repository](#github)**.

We can't wait to hear from you!
